pageInfo.pagePurpose: To inform potential customers about the features and benefits of the Zoho Payroll software, and to generate leads by encouraging users to sign up for a free trial or request a product demonstration.

businessEntities.name: Payroll
evidence: Payroll made easy, scalable, and compliant
Give your team a modern payroll experience

businessEntities.name: Employee
evidence: Interact with employees in real time

businessEntities.name: Compliance
evidence: Stay compliant, without thinking about compliance
PF, ESI, LWF, PT, and IT

businessEntities.name: Report
evidence: Get instant insights with powerful reports

businessEntities.name: Integration
evidence: Natively built. Deeply connected. Inherently collaborative

businessEntities.name: Customer
evidence: Loved by India's famous startups and world renowned brands
Loved by both customers and critics

clickableElements.label: Stay here
clickableElements.businessIntent: Dismiss a country/region redirection suggestion
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: The user remains on the current page, and any banner suggesting a different regional site is closed.

clickableElements.label: English
clickableElements.businessIntent: Change the display language of the website
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Opens a dropdown or menu allowing the user to select a different language for the website content.

clickableElements.label: Request a demo
clickableElements.businessIntent: Initiate contact with the sales team for a product demonstration
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Opens a form or modal for the user to submit their contact information to schedule a demo.

clickableElements.label: Web and Mobile app
clickableElements.businessIntent: Learn about platform accessibility
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Likely scrolls or filters the view to show information about the product's availability on web and mobile platforms.

clickableElements.label: Instant Payslips
clickableElements.businessIntent: Learn about a specific product feature
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Scrolls or filters the view to display details about the 'Instant Payslips' feature.

clickableElements.label: Digitisation
clickableElements.businessIntent: Learn about a specific product benefit
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Scrolls or filters the view to display details about how the product helps digitise payroll operations.

clickableElements.label: Communication
clickableElements.businessIntent: Learn about a specific product feature
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Scrolls or filters the view to display details about communication features within the product.

clickableElements.label: Go to Previous testimonial
clickableElements.businessIntent: Navigate through customer testimonials
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Displays the previous testimonial in a carousel or slider component.

clickableElements.label: Go to Next testimonial
clickableElements.businessIntent: Navigate through customer testimonials
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Displays the next testimonial in a carousel or slider component.

clickableElements.label: Request Demo
clickableElements.businessIntent: Initiate contact with the sales team for a product demonstration
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Opens a form or modal for the user to submit their contact information to schedule a demo.

clickableElements.label: Submit My Request
clickableElements.businessIntent: Submit personal information for a sales inquiry
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Submits the filled-out demo request form and shows a confirmation message.

clickableElements.label: Manage Cookies
clickableElements.businessIntent: Customize cookie preferences
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Opens a settings modal where the user can select which categories of cookies to allow or disallow.

clickableElements.label: Accept All Cookies
clickableElements.businessIntent: Consent to all website cookies
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Accepts all cookies and closes the cookie consent banner.

clickableElements.label: Reject Unnecessary Cookies
clickableElements.businessIntent: Decline non-essential website cookies
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Rejects optional cookies and closes the cookie consent banner, keeping only essential ones active.

clickableElements.label: close
clickableElements.businessIntent: Close a modal or popup
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Closes the currently active modal dialog, such as a cookie settings panel.

clickableElements.label: Save & Exit
clickableElements.businessIntent: Save cookie preferences and close the settings modal
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Saves the user's selected cookie preferences and closes the modal.

clickableElements.label: Zoho
clickableElements.businessIntent: Navigate to the main Zoho homepage
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Redirects the user to the homepage of the Zoho corporation website.

clickableElements.label: Sign In
clickableElements.businessIntent: Access an existing user account
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Redirects the user to the Zoho central login page to sign in to their account.

clickableElements.label: Sign up now
clickableElements.businessIntent: Create a new user account
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Redirects the user to the Zoho Payroll signup page to begin the registration process.

clickableElements.label: EXPLORE ALL PRODUCTS
clickableElements.businessIntent: View the entire suite of Zoho products
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Navigates to a page that lists all available Zoho applications.

clickableElements.label: Try now
clickableElements.businessIntent: Start a free trial for a specific Zoho product
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Navigates the user to the signup or trial page for the associated Zoho product.

clickableElements.label: Start My Free Trial
clickableElements.businessIntent: Create a new user account for a free trial
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Redirects the user to the Zoho Payroll signup page to begin a free trial.

clickableElements.label: Learn how
clickableElements.businessIntent: Get more information about a specific topic
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Navigates to a page or article with more details, in this case about setting up payroll for a new fiscal year.

clickableElements.label: Get in Touch
clickableElements.businessIntent: Contact customer support
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Navigates to the support contact page.

clickableElements.label: Features
clickableElements.businessIntent: Navigate to the product features page
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Redirects the user to a page detailing all the features of Zoho Payroll.

clickableElements.label: Pricing
clickableElements.businessIntent: Navigate to the pricing information page
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Redirects the user to a page showing the different pricing plans for Zoho Payroll.

clickableElements.label: Integrations
clickableElements.businessIntent: Navigate to the integrations page
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Redirects the user to a page listing the other applications that Zoho Payroll integrates with.

clickableElements.label: Customers
clickableElements.businessIntent: View customer case studies or testimonials
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Redirects the user to a page showcasing customer stories and testimonials.

clickableElements.label: Privacy Policy
clickableElements.businessIntent: View the company's privacy policy
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Navigates to the legal page detailing the company's data privacy policies.

clickableElements.label: Learn More
clickableElements.businessIntent: Get more information about cookie policies
clickableElements.expectedOutcome: Navigates to the cookie policy page for more detailed information.

forms.purpose: To allow users to search the website for products, solutions, or resources.

fields.businessMeaning: The user's search term for finding information across the Zoho website.

forms.purpose: To capture user information for a product demonstration request or a sales inquiry.

fields.businessMeaning: The full name of the person requesting the demo.
The email address of the person requesting the demo.
The phone number of the person requesting the demo.
The user's country or the product edition they are interested in. The options include various countries.
The number of employees in the user's company, used for lead qualification.
Information on how the user learned about Zoho Payroll, used for marketing attribution.

fields.fieldName: How did you hear about Zoho Payroll?
fields.businessMeaning: A free-text field for the user to describe their specific business needs or questions.
A CAPTCHA field to prevent spam submissions.
A hidden field likely used for security or anti-spam measures (e.g., a CSRF token).
A hidden field likely used for tracking marketing campaign data, possibly from Google Ads.
A hidden field specifying the URL to redirect the user to after form submission.
A hidden field to pre-populate the subject line of the resulting sales case or email.

workflows.name: Request a Product Demonstration
steps: User clicks the 'Request a demo' or 'Request Demo' button.
User fills in their contact details, company size, and requirements into the demo request form.
User clicks the 'Submit My Request' button to send the inquiry to the sales team.

workflows.name: Sign Up for a Free Trial
steps: User clicks the 'Sign up now' or 'Start My Free Trial' link.
User is navigated to the account creation page to begin the registration process.

workflows.name: Sign In to Existing Account
steps: User is navigated to the Zoho accounts login page to enter their credentials.

workflows.name: Search Website Content
steps: User types a search term into the search field.
User is presented with search results.
evidence: placeholder: Search for products, solutions, resources...

userGoals.goal: Evaluate Zoho Payroll for my business
Start a free trial of the software
evidence: link text: Start My Free Trial

userGoals.goal: Contact the sales team for a guided demonstration
Understand the pricing and subscription plans
Check if it integrates with other software I use
Access my existing Zoho Payroll account

predictedMissingUI.reason: The page includes a 'Testimonials' heading and buttons labeled 'Go to Previous testimonial' and 'Go to Next testimonial', which strongly imply a carousel for displaying customer quotes and attributions that are not present in the extracted facts.
The search form with the 'query' field is present, but no corresponding submit button is listed in the facts. Search bars typically have a clickable button or icon to initiate the search.

The 'Request a demo' buttons exist, as does a detailed form. Typically, clicking such a button on a landing page opens the form in a modal window rather than navigating to a new page, to keep the user in context.

pageNarrative: This page is a marketing landing page for Zoho's Payroll software, designed to attract and convert potential customers. It outlines the product's primary benefits, such as simplifying payroll, managing compliance, and offering an employee self-service portal. The page uses social proof like customer logos and testimonials to build trust. Key user actions are prominently featured, encouraging visitors to sign up for a free trial or request a personalized demo from the sales team.
